dag_id.description: Optional DAG to place this view into

folder_id.description: Optional folder ID used to organize this view in the SQL editor sidebar.

is_test.description: Whether this view is for testing only and will auto-expire.

name.description: Unique name for the view. Used as the table name in HogQL queries. Must not conflict with existing table names.

query.description:
HogQL query definition as a JSON object with a "query" key containing the SQL string and a "kind" key (always "HogQLQuery"). Format the SQL string multi-line with indentation and inline `--` comments for non-obvious logic — the SQL editor renders it verbatim, so avoid minified single-line SQL. Example: {"kind": "HogQLQuery", "query": "SELECT
    event,
    count() AS cnt
FROM events
GROUP BY event
LIMIT 100"}
